result.stdout:
AzureLetsEncrypt 1.4.0 - Twitter:@DenisVoituron

  Generate a new free Let's Encrypt certificate for specifis domains.
  You must install it manually in Azure (go to your "App Service / TLS/SSL settings" section.
  The generated certificate will be store in a "./store" folder.

AzureLetsEncrypt --domains=[List_of_domains] --password=[Password]

   --domains     List of domains to include in the certificate (no wildcard),
                 separated by comas.
   --password    Password used to encrypt the pfx certificate.
   --path        Root folder of the website (default is D:/home/site/wwwroot).

Example:
   AzureLetsEncrypt --domains=dvoituron.com,www.dvoituron.com --password=MyP@ssword
